metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4135
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig2: Endogenous SNX4 colocalizes with early and recycling endosomal markers RAB5 (Pearson's coefficient 0.58) and Rab11 (Pearson's coefficient 0.45) in mouse hippocampal neurons. The specificity of SNX4 localization to the endosome markers was assessed by including SNX4 knockdown (shSNX4-2) that showed a decrease in colocalisation with RAB5 (Pearson's coefficient 0.41) and RAB11 (Pearson's coefficient 0.31).

Fig3 and S3C: Endogenous SNX4 colocalizes with presynaptic marker synaptophysin1 (Pearson's coefficient 0.71) in hippocampal mouse neurons. A drop in colocalisation (Pearson's coefficient 0.55) was seen upon SNX4 knockdown (shSNX4-2). The signal of SNX4 in synaptophysin-1 punctae was restored when the shRNAs were combined with their rescue constructs.

FigS3A-B: The localization of endogenous SNX4 to the presynapse was also observed using bassoon, a marker of the presynaptic active zone.

Fig4A-E: Subcellular fractions of the mouse hippocampus detected SNX4 in the synaptosome (SyS) and synaptic membrane fraction (SyM) comparable to the expression profiles of presynaptic marker Vamp2.

Fig4F-G: Immuno-gold electron microscopy localised SNX4 inside the presynaptic terminals (as marked by 'T'). Quantitative analysis shows that the SNX4 immunosignal was more abundant in the presynaptic than the postsynaptic terminal.
FigS4: The findings of the immunogold EM were verified by a reduction in signal when SNX4 antibody was incubated with blocking peptide (Synaptic Systems, Cat. No. 392-0P at a ratio of 1:10).

The specificity of the SNX4 antibody was verified via Western blot and immunocytochemistry along with the SNX4 knockdowns.
Fig1A-B: Western blot showed an expected SNX4 band of ~50kD band. Inclusion of SNX4 knockdowns showed a reduction in signal intensity which was rescued upon inclusion of their corresponding rescue constructs.

Fig1B-F: Immunocytochemistry also showed that the total SNX4 signal intensity was decreased upon SNX4 knockdown and was restored when shRNAs were combined with their rescue constructs. On the other hand, the total synaptophysin-1 intensity remained unchanged upon modulation of SNX4 levels.

In summary, SNX4 colocalises with early and recycling endosomes and is majorly present in the presynaptic terminal.

"Extrinsic component of.." was chosen due to the presence of phosphatidylinositol 3-phosphate binding PX domain (Uniprot Q91YJ2) that is required for membrane localization.. Experimental description: The target sequences of the shRNAs were as follows: GGG AAT GAC TAC CAA ACT C (shSNX4-1), GCA GTG GAA TAG ATA CAT TAT (shSNX4-2), GCT GAT ATT GAA CGC TTC AAA (shSNX4-3), TTC TCC GAA CGT GTC ACG T (Control, scramble). Mouse SNX4 cDNA was used to induce the silent point mutations in rescue constructs.

Primary neurons were cultured from mouse E18 hippocampi or cortices.
